User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user roles and profile information.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

createdAt.description: When the user profile was created.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a project that tasks can be assigned to.

id.description: The unique identifier for the project.

description.description: A brief description of the project.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who created the project.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A daily task assigned to a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the task.

projectId.description: The ID of the project this task belongs to (optional).

description.description: A detailed description of what was done or needs to be done.

assignedTo.description: The UID of the user assigned to the task.

assignedBy.description: The UID of the user who assigned the task.

date.description: The date for which this task is tracked (daily tracking).
